tool.name: calendar_create_event
tool.description: Create a new event on Google Calendar. Provide a title and date at minimum. Optionally set a start time, duration in minutes, and description.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Start time in HH:MM 24-hour format (e.g. '14:30'). Leave empty for all-day event.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration in minutes (e.g. '60' for 1 hour). Default is 60.
